hypothesis: A capped ExECT S4 monolithic label-policy run extends frozen S3 v1.2 bridges to seizure frequency and medication temporality without changing S3 scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates the ExECT S4 eleven-family program contract only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S4 diagnostics (S3 + seizure frequency + Rx temporality), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across eleven families is not comparable to frozen S3 nine-family or S2 five-family headlines.
S3 label-policy bridges from frozen v1.2 are reused for S1–S3 families; see docs/exect_s4_gold_policy.md.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
